name: Expense Reports by Employee
description: All expense reports submitted by a specific employee
sql:
SELECT
    REPORT_ID,
    REPORT_NAME,
    SUBMIT_DATE,
    APPROVAL_DATE,
    PAYMENT_DATE,
    REPORT_TOTAL,
    APPROVED_AMOUNT,
    CURRENCY_CODE,
    REPORT_STATUS_CODE,
    BUSINESS_PURPOSE
FROM EXPENSE_REPORT
WHERE LOGIN_ID = '{employee_email}'
ORDER BY SUBMIT_DATE DESC

name: Expense Reports Pending Approval
description: All reports currently awaiting approval
sql:
SELECT
    REPORT_ID,
    REPORT_NAME,
    EMPLOYEE_NAME,
    LOGIN_ID,
    SUBMIT_DATE,
    REPORT_TOTAL,
    CURRENCY_CODE,
    COST_CENTER_CODE,
    BUSINESS_PURPOSE
FROM EXPENSE_REPORT
WHERE REPORT_STATUS_CODE = 'A_PEND'
ORDER BY SUBMIT_DATE ASC

name: Expense Reports by Date Range
description: Reports submitted within a date range
sql:
SELECT
    REPORT_ID,
    REPORT_NAME,
    EMPLOYEE_NAME,
    LOGIN_ID,
    SUBMIT_DATE,
    APPROVAL_DATE,
    REPORT_TOTAL,
    APPROVED_AMOUNT,
    CURRENCY_CODE,
    REPORT_STATUS_CODE
FROM EXPENSE_REPORT
WHERE SUBMIT_DATE BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'
ORDER BY SUBMIT_DATE DESC

name: Expense Reports by Cost Center
description: All reports charged to a specific cost center
sql:
SELECT
    r.REPORT_ID,
    r.REPORT_NAME,
    r.EMPLOYEE_NAME,
    r.SUBMIT_DATE,
    r.APPROVAL_DATE,
    r.REPORT_TOTAL,
    r.APPROVED_AMOUNT,
    r.CURRENCY_CODE,
    r.REPORT_STATUS_CODE
FROM EXPENSE_REPORT r
WHERE r.COST_CENTER_CODE = '{cost_center}'
  AND r.SUBMIT_DATE BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'
ORDER BY r.SUBMIT_DATE DESC

name: Expense Entries with Policy Exceptions
description: Line items flagged as policy violations
sql:
SELECT
    e.REPORT_ID,
    r.EMPLOYEE_NAME,
    r.LOGIN_ID,
    e.EXPENSE_TYPE_NAME,
    e.TRANSACTION_DATE,
    e.TRANSACTION_AMOUNT,
    e.TRANSACTION_CURRENCY,
    e.VENDOR_DESCRIPTION,
    e.COMMENT
FROM EXPENSE_ENTRY e
JOIN EXPENSE_REPORT r ON r.REPORT_ID = e.REPORT_ID
WHERE e.HAS_EXCEPTION = 'Y'
  AND r.SUBMIT_DATE BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'
ORDER BY e.TRANSACTION_AMOUNT DESC

name: Entries with Missing Receipts
description: Expense entries where a receipt is required but not received
sql:
SELECT
    e.REPORT_ID,
    r.EMPLOYEE_NAME,
    r.LOGIN_ID,
    e.EXPENSE_TYPE_NAME,
    e.TRANSACTION_DATE,
    e.TRANSACTION_AMOUNT,
    e.TRANSACTION_CURRENCY,
    e.VENDOR_DESCRIPTION,
    r.REPORT_STATUS_CODE
FROM EXPENSE_ENTRY e
JOIN EXPENSE_REPORT r ON r.REPORT_ID = e.REPORT_ID
WHERE e.RECEIPT_REQUIRED = 'Y'
  AND e.RECEIPT_RECEIVED = 'N'
ORDER BY e.TRANSACTION_AMOUNT DESC

name: Top Spenders by Expense Type
description: Employees with the highest approved spend for a given expense type
sql:
SELECT
    r.EMPLOYEE_NAME,
    r.LOGIN_ID,
    r.COST_CENTER_CODE,
    e.EXPENSE_TYPE_NAME,
    SUM(e.APPROVED_AMOUNT) AS TOTAL_APPROVED,
    e.APPROVED_CURRENCY,
    COUNT(DISTINCT r.REPORT_ID) AS REPORT_COUNT
FROM EXPENSE_ENTRY e
JOIN EXPENSE_REPORT r ON r.REPORT_ID = e.REPORT_ID
WHERE e.EXPENSE_TYPE_CODE = '{expense_type_code}'
  AND r.SUBMIT_DATE BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'
GROUP BY
    r.EMPLOYEE_NAME, r.LOGIN_ID, r.COST_CENTER_CODE,
    e.EXPENSE_TYPE_NAME, e.APPROVED_CURRENCY
ORDER BY TOTAL_APPROVED DESC

name: Expense Summary by Type
description: Total approved spend grouped by expense type for a period
sql:
SELECT
    e.EXPENSE_TYPE_CODE,
    e.EXPENSE_TYPE_NAME,
    COUNT(*) AS ENTRY_COUNT,
    SUM(e.TRANSACTION_AMOUNT) AS TOTAL_TRANSACTION,
    SUM(e.APPROVED_AMOUNT) AS TOTAL_APPROVED,
    e.APPROVED_CURRENCY
FROM EXPENSE_ENTRY e
JOIN EXPENSE_REPORT r ON r.REPORT_ID = e.REPORT_ID
WHERE r.SUBMIT_DATE BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'
GROUP BY e.EXPENSE_TYPE_CODE, e.EXPENSE_TYPE_NAME, e.APPROVED_CURRENCY
ORDER BY TOTAL_APPROVED DESC

name: Expense Allocations by Project Code
description: All expense entries allocated to a specific project
sql:
SELECT
    a.REPORT_ID,
    r.EMPLOYEE_NAME,
    r.LOGIN_ID,
    e.EXPENSE_TYPE_NAME,
    e.TRANSACTION_DATE,
    a.AMOUNT,
    a.PERCENTAGE,
    a.CURRENCY_CODE,
    a.GL_ACCOUNT,
    a.COST_CENTER,
    a.PROJECT_CODE
FROM EXPENSE_ALLOCATION a
JOIN EXPENSE_ENTRY e ON e.REPORT_ID = a.REPORT_ID AND e.ENTRY_ID = a.ENTRY_ID
JOIN EXPENSE_REPORT r ON r.REPORT_ID = a.REPORT_ID
WHERE a.PROJECT_CODE = '{project_code}'
  AND r.SUBMIT_DATE BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'
ORDER BY e.TRANSACTION_DATE DESC

name: Expense Allocations by G/L Account
description: All allocated amounts posted to a specific G/L account
sql:
SELECT
    a.REPORT_ID,
    r.EMPLOYEE_NAME,
    r.SUBMIT_DATE,
    e.EXPENSE_TYPE_NAME,
    a.COST_CENTER,
    a.GL_ACCOUNT,
    a.AMOUNT,
    a.CURRENCY_CODE
FROM EXPENSE_ALLOCATION a
JOIN EXPENSE_ENTRY e ON e.REPORT_ID = a.REPORT_ID AND e.ENTRY_ID = a.ENTRY_ID
JOIN EXPENSE_REPORT r ON r.REPORT_ID = a.REPORT_ID
WHERE a.GL_ACCOUNT = '{gl_account}'
  AND r.SUBMIT_DATE BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'
ORDER BY r.SUBMIT_DATE DESC

name: Travel Requests Pending Approval
description: Pre-trip requests awaiting approval
sql:
SELECT
    REQUEST_ID,
    REQUEST_NAME,
    LOGIN_ID,
    SUBMIT_DATE,
    START_DATE,
    END_DATE,
    DESTINATION,
    TOTAL_APPROVED_AMOUNT,
    CURRENCY_CODE,
    TRIP_PURPOSE
FROM TRAVEL_REQUEST
WHERE REQUEST_STATUS_CODE = 'PendingApproval'
ORDER BY SUBMIT_DATE ASC

name: Travel Requests by Employee
description: All travel requests for a specific employee
sql:
SELECT
    REQUEST_ID,
    REQUEST_NAME,
    SUBMIT_DATE,
    APPROVAL_DATE,
    START_DATE,
    END_DATE,
    DESTINATION,
    TOTAL_APPROVED_AMOUNT,
    CURRENCY_CODE,
    REQUEST_STATUS_CODE
FROM TRAVEL_REQUEST
WHERE LOGIN_ID = '{employee_email}'
ORDER BY START_DATE DESC

name: Air Segments for a Travel Request
description: All air travel segments within a specific request
sql:
SELECT
    s.REQUEST_ID,
    s.SEGMENT_ID,
    s.ORIGIN,
    s.DESTINATION,
    s.DEPARTURE_DATE,
    s.ARRIVAL_DATE,
    s.VENDOR_NAME,
    s.ESTIMATED_AMOUNT,
    s.CURRENCY_CODE,
    s.BOOKING_STATUS
FROM TRAVEL_REQUEST_SEGMENT s
WHERE s.REQUEST_ID = '{request_id}'
  AND s.SEGMENT_TYPE = 'AIR'
ORDER BY s.DEPARTURE_DATE

name: Upcoming Travel by Date Range
description: Approved trips with departure dates in a given window
sql:
SELECT
    r.REQUEST_ID,
    r.REQUEST_NAME,
    r.LOGIN_ID,
    r.START_DATE,
    r.END_DATE,
    r.DESTINATION,
    r.TOTAL_APPROVED_AMOUNT,
    r.CURRENCY_CODE,
    r.TRIP_PURPOSE
FROM TRAVEL_REQUEST r
WHERE r.REQUEST_STATUS_CODE = 'Approved'
  AND r.START_DATE BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'
ORDER BY r.START_DATE

name: Active Employees
description: All active Concur user accounts
sql:
SELECT
    EMPLOYEE_ID,
    LOGIN_ID,
    FIRST_NAME,
    LAST_NAME,
    EMAIL,
    DEPARTMENT,
    COST_CENTER,
    COUNTRY_CODE,
    POLICY_GROUP
FROM EMPLOYEE
WHERE EMPLOYEE_STATUS = 'Active'
ORDER BY LAST_NAME, FIRST_NAME

name: Employees by Cost Center
description: All employees assigned to a specific cost center
sql:
SELECT
    EMPLOYEE_ID,
    LOGIN_ID,
    FIRST_NAME,
    LAST_NAME,
    EMAIL,
    DEPARTMENT,
    EMPLOYEE_STATUS,
    POLICY_GROUP
FROM EMPLOYEE
WHERE COST_CENTER = '{cost_center}'
ORDER BY LAST_NAME, FIRST_NAME

name: Direct Reports by Manager
description: All employees reporting to a specific manager
sql:
SELECT
    e.EMPLOYEE_ID,
    e.LOGIN_ID,
    e.FIRST_NAME,
    e.LAST_NAME,
    e.DEPARTMENT,
    e.COST_CENTER,
    e.EMPLOYEE_STATUS
FROM EMPLOYEE e
WHERE e.MANAGER_EMPLOYEE_ID = (
    SELECT EMPLOYEE_ID FROM EMPLOYEE WHERE LOGIN_ID = '{manager_email}'
)
ORDER BY e.LAST_NAME, e.FIRST_NAME

name: Payment Batch Detail
description: All reports included in a specific payment batch
sql:
SELECT
    p.BATCH_ID,
    p.REPORT_ID,
    r.REPORT_NAME,
    r.EMPLOYEE_NAME,
    r.LOGIN_ID,
    p.PAYMENT_DATE,
    p.PAYMENT_AMOUNT,
    p.CURRENCY_CODE,
    p.PAYMENT_TYPE,
    p.PAYMENT_STATUS
FROM PAYMENT_BATCH p
JOIN EXPENSE_REPORT r ON r.REPORT_ID = p.REPORT_ID
WHERE p.BATCH_ID = '{batch_id}'
ORDER BY r.EMPLOYEE_NAME

name: Payments by Employee
description: All reimbursement payments made to a specific employee
sql:
SELECT
    p.BATCH_ID,
    p.REPORT_ID,
    r.REPORT_NAME,
    p.PAYMENT_DATE,
    p.PAYMENT_AMOUNT,
    p.CURRENCY_CODE,
    p.PAYMENT_TYPE,
    p.PAYMENT_STATUS
FROM PAYMENT_BATCH p
JOIN EXPENSE_REPORT r ON r.REPORT_ID = p.REPORT_ID
WHERE r.LOGIN_ID = '{employee_email}'
ORDER BY p.PAYMENT_DATE DESC

name: Approved Reports Not Yet Paid
description: Reports that are fully approved but have no payment date
sql:
SELECT
    r.REPORT_ID,
    r.REPORT_NAME,
    r.EMPLOYEE_NAME,
    r.LOGIN_ID,
    r.APPROVAL_DATE,
    r.APPROVED_AMOUNT,
    r.CURRENCY_CODE,
    r.COST_CENTER_CODE
FROM EXPENSE_REPORT r
LEFT JOIN PAYMENT_BATCH p ON p.REPORT_ID = r.REPORT_ID
WHERE r.REPORT_STATUS_CODE = 'A_APVD'
  AND p.BATCH_ID IS NULL
ORDER BY r.APPROVAL_DATE ASC

name: Entertainment Spend with Attendees
description: Meals and entertainment entries with attendee detail
sql:
SELECT
    r.REPORT_ID,
    r.EMPLOYEE_NAME,
    r.LOGIN_ID,
    e.TRANSACTION_DATE,
    e.TRANSACTION_AMOUNT,
    e.TRANSACTION_CURRENCY,
    e.VENDOR_DESCRIPTION,
    a.FIRST_NAME,
    a.LAST_NAME,
    a.COMPANY,
    a.ATTENDEE_TYPE,
    a.AMOUNT AS AMOUNT_PER_ATTENDEE
FROM EXPENSE_ATTENDEE a
JOIN EXPENSE_ENTRY e ON e.REPORT_ID = a.REPORT_ID AND e.ENTRY_ID = a.ENTRY_ID
JOIN EXPENSE_REPORT r ON r.REPORT_ID = e.REPORT_ID
WHERE r.LOGIN_ID = '{employee_email}'
  AND r.SUBMIT_DATE BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'
ORDER BY e.TRANSACTION_DATE DESC
